headline: Woman's 'Manifesting' Vision Board Is Just Photos Of Her Ex 'Not Thriving' — He's Thriving
summary: 'He's about to fail,' Amanda said. He got a promotion. 'It's part of my plan,' Amanda said. Her therapist is concerned.
fullBody: Amanda Manifesting has a board of her ex's 'downfall.' He is thriving. 'It's a test,' Amanda said. He got a promotion, married, and moved to Bali. 'He's in the middle of a breakdown,' Amanda said. He is not. 'I'm committed,' Amanda said. Her therapist suggested 'maybe accepting reality.' 'Reality is part of the plan,' Amanda said. The plan is failing. Amanda is 'still manifesting.'
